scripts.format: prettier --check package.json pnpm-lock.yaml tsconfig.json next-env.d.ts next.config.ts postcss.config.mjs components.json tailwind.config.ts eslint.config.mjs vitest.config.ts orval.config.ts src tests docs/api/openapi.yaml
scripts.lint: eslint src tests next.config.ts tailwind.config.ts vitest.config.ts orval.config.ts --max-warnings=0
scripts.db:generate: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('src/server/storage/schema.ts')) { console.error('Drizzle schema 尚未落地：请先完成 T021，并对齐 specs/001-mvp-admin-console/database-design.md'); process.exit(1); }" && drizzle-kit generate --config drizzle.config.ts
scripts.db:migrate: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('src/server/storage/migrations')) { console.error('Drizzle migrations 尚未落地：请先完成 T022，并对齐 specs/001-mvp-admin-console/database-design.md'); process.exit(1); }" && drizzle-kit migrate --config drizzle.config.ts
scripts.db:check: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const path of ['specs/001-mvp-admin-console/database-design.md', 'drizzle.config.ts', 'src/server/storage/schema.ts']) { if(!fs.existsSync(path)) { console.error('数据库链路未就绪：缺少 ' + path); process.exit(1); } }" && drizzle-kit check --config drizzle.config.ts
